overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring a dimly lit abandoned institutional building. The character walks through reception and corridor areas using a flashlight to navigate the creepy, desaturated environment with greenish tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned reception office transitioning to institutional hallway

events.description: character moves from the reception office through the archway into the main hallway
ambient lighting decreases as character moves deeper into the corridor away from the reception area

agents.ego_description: character walks past the cluttered reception desk with flashlight in hand and proceeds into the dimly lit hallway

entered.detail: cluttered wooden desk with a black rotary phone and scattered papers
tall wooden cabinet with glass doors against the back wall
dead withered plant sitting on the counter
arched doorway leading from the office to the main hallway
wooden bench with slats against the hallway wall
structural support pillar in the hallway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in an abandoned reception office with a cluttered wooden desk and scattered papers. The character, holding a flashlight, walks past the desk and transitions through an archway into a dimly lit institutional hallway with benches and support pillars.

scene_state.functional_zone: long institutional corridor with benches and bulletin boards

events.description: corridor becomes noticeably darker with fewer working overhead lights
character slows slightly while approaching the double doors at the corridor end

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily down the long corridor, flashlight beam illuminating the walls and benches

entered.detail: cork bulletin board with papers pinned to it on the left wall
red fire safety sign mounted on the right wall
white double doors with mesh windows at the end of the hallway

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a long, narrow corridor with wooden benches lining the walls and bulletin boards covered in papers. The lighting grows progressively darker, and white double doors become visible at the far end of the hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor end approaching mesh-windowed double doors

events.description: character slows down and stops as reaching the double doors

agents.ego_description: character walks toward and stops at the double doors at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: wire mesh window in the upper half of the double doors
horizontal metal push bar on the double doors
exposed metal pipe running along the wall near the doors

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the white double doors at the end of the corridor, revealing mesh windows and a push bar. The surrounding walls show exposed pipes and worn paint as the character slows to a stop at the doorway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered administrative office into the oppressive depths of a dimly lit institutional corridor. It begins in an abandoned reception area, moving past a wooden desk strewn with papers before passing through an archway into a hallway defined by support pillars and benches. As the character proceeds deeper, the environment grows progressively darker, with the walls becoming lined by bulletin boards and the air feeling more enclosed. The scene then shifts toward the far end of the narrow hall, where exposed pipes and worn paint emerge from the shadows. Finally, the camera slows to a stop as it reaches a set of white double doors featuring mesh windows and a metal push bar.
